description_long: This is a compact dumbbell with two large, faceted black end caps and a short, cylindrical handle connecting them. The end caps are polygonal, giving them a geometric, almost hexagonal appearance, and are made of a dense, matte black material. The handle is metallic and smooth, with a light gray finish, and appears to be ergonomically sized for a single hand grip. On one side of the dumbbell, clear white text reads '5KG MADE IN KOREA', indicating its weight and origin. The overall design is modern and robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor fitness activities. The dumbbell appears clean, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A modern black dumbbell with polygonal end caps, a smooth metallic handle, and clear '5KG MADE IN KOREA' markings. The design is robust and clean, suitable for fitness use.
description_view_0: The dumbbell is seen from the side, showing the polygonal black end caps and the metallic handle, with no visible text.
description_view_1: This view displays the '5KG MADE IN KOREA' markings on both end caps, highlighting the branding and weight information.
description_view_2: A side view similar to view 0, showing the faceted end caps and handle, but without visible text.
description_view_3: Another side view, focusing on the geometric end caps and handle, with no visible markings.
attribute_handle_type: Short cylindrical handle, round cross-section, smooth metallic surface, no visible knurling or ergonomic contouring.
attribute_end_cap_design: Polygonal (multi-faceted) end caps, black rubberized material, flat faces, no visible patterns except for printed text.
attribute_brand_logo: No brand logo, but white text '5KG MADE IN KOREA' is visible on the end caps.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight markings are present, printed in white on the end caps, showing '5KG'.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or damage.
